summary: Iter9 frontend-only palette refresh verified. Logged in as admin@ifsi.fr, inspected CSS variables, sidebar, dashboard and Coordination > Fiches Projets. All target colors are correctly applied (cream background, navy sidebar, coral accents, peach Éphéméride card, navy KPI numbers in Outfit, coral badges on Fiches Projets).

issues: The 'MODE EDITION' banner in Layout.js still uses bg-amber-50 + text-amber-700. To stay coherent with the new cream/coral palette, it should be peach (#FFF1E8) or coral-tinted instead of amber. Minor, not blocking.

The thin top bar containing the sidebar toggle still uses bg-white + border-slate-200 (and dark:bg-slate-900). It visually breaks the cream/navy palette continuity between sidebar and content area. Could be made bg-background or removed.

action_items: (Optional) Recolor the 'Mode édition' banner from amber to peach/coral to fully match the new palette.
(Optional) Align the small top bar above the main content with the new palette (bg-background or transparent).
critical_code_review_comments: Layout.js still references dark:bg-slate-900 on the top bar and dark:bg-amber-950 on the Mode édition banner — these styles will be visible if dark mode is toggled and won't match the new identity. Minor.
Dashboard.js PIE_COLORS array is unchanged (indigo/violet/cyan) — pie chart colors still feel generic compared to the new coral/navy/peach identity. Consider replacing with brand-aligned palette.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter9 palette verified end-to-end via computed styles. CSS root vars: --background 36 30% 93%, --primary 13 78% 62%, --brand-navy 220 60% 14%, --brand-coral 13 78% 62%. Computed body bg = rgb(243,238,232) (#F3EEE8). Sidebar bg = rgb(14,31,54) (#0E1F36). Section labels Consultation/Coordination color = rgb(233,116,81) (#E97451). Active NavLink shows the coral vertical bar and orange icon. Avatar circle = #E97451. Éphéméride card = rgb(255,241,232) (#FFF1E8) with coral 'Éphéméride' label. KPI numbers = rgb(14,31,54) with font Outfit. On Coordination > Fiches Projets: header bars (Déroulement + each UE row) bg = #0E1F36 navy, 'X à programmer' badges bg = #E97451 coral. Login flow working.
rca of the issue: No bug found for iter9 scope.
